summary: The following standard adapts [ERC-4626](./eip-4626.md) to support multiple assets or entry points for the same share token. This also enables Vaults which don't have a true share token but rather convert between two arbitrary external tokens. It adds a new `share` method to the Vault, to allow the [ERC-20](./eip-20.md) dependency to be externalized. It also adds Vault-to-Share lookup to the share token. Lastly, it enforces [ERC-165](./eip-165.md) support for Vaults and the share token.
title: Multi-Asset ERC-4626 Vaults
